title: Hard to Get
writer: Jerry Wald, Maurice Leo, Richard Macaulay
actors: Dick Powell, Olivia de Havilland, Charles Winninger
plot: When spoiled young heiress Maggie Richards (Olivia de Havilland) tries to charge some gasoline at an auto camp run by Bill Davis (Dick Powell), he makes her work out her bill by making beds. Resolving to get even, she pretends to ...
